queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the relationship between the absence of a checking account and credit risk mitigation.

queries.feature_definition: Loan purpose: purchase of radio or TV.
queries.question: Statistical impact of loan purposes for radio or television acquisition on reducing credit default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance below 0 DM.
queries.question: Investigation into the association between negative checking account balances and decreased likelihood of default.
